corrections.text:
A SUCCESSFUL COLLEGE GROWS

In one year our increase has been forty per cent.

L. D. S. BUSINESS COLLEGE
SALT LAKE CITY, UTAH

Day Sessions: seven dollars a month
Night Sessions: four dollars a month
